name: Complete Bus Sltons Accnting
owner_or_parent: Michael J Dell, CPA (Complete Business Services)
recent_news: Source data appears mis-classified: the website combussol.com and address 7329 Saltsburg Rd resolve to Complete Business Services, a CPA/accounting/payroll firm owned by Michael J. Dell, not a school-bus contractor. The actual school-bus operator at the adjacent address 7035 Saltsburg Rd is Krise Transportation (founded 2016 by Tim Krise; Pittsburgh Public Schools carrier code G).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target as-is — this record is an accounting firm, not a transport operator. If the underlying intent was to flag the Saltsburg Rd school-bus presence, the real candidate is Krise Transportation (separate USDOT, separate address); recommend de-duping or replacing this row before outreach.

name: Krapf School Bus
principals: Krapf family (six family members in management)
districts_or_customers: Red Lion Area School District (York County, PA)
recent_news: Red Lion location is the local arm (DBA Red Lion Bus, Inc.) of Krapf Group, one of the largest privately-owned U.S. school-bus contractors with 2,500+ vehicles across PA/DE/NJ/NY (2024-2025 industry rankings). Krapf has been growing via expansion, not selling.
fit_notes: Not realistically a tuck-in: this is a single branch of Krapf Group, an established multi-generational family-owned platform with 2,500+ buses across 4 states. Krapf is far more likely a strategic competitor or a peer-of-Summit acquirer of small operators than a target. Standalone Red Lion branch would not be carved out absent a full-platform sale.

name: Attica Bus Svc Inc
principals: Ralph Marvin (Owner/President; also long-time Transportation Expediter for Attica CSD)
districts_or_customers: Attica Central School District (50+ years until 2024-25)
recent_news: Attica CSD announced that Student Transportation of America (STA) will take over non-public and special-education runs starting fall 2025, ending 50+ years of service from Attica Bus Service. STA's New York acquisition push announced ~150 vehicles and $7M+ annualized revenue across three NY contracts including Attica. Strongly suggests the company has lost its anchor contract or been effectively sold/wound down.
website: http://www.atticabus.com/ (currently a parked InMotion hosting page)
fit_notes: Likely a missed window — anchor district contract appears to have moved to STA for 2025-26, which typically signals either an outright STA acquisition of the rolling stock or a competitive bid loss. If buses/yard/CDLs remain under Marvin and the loss is recent, there may still be a partial asset/yard tuck-in or driver-roster pickup opportunity in Western NY (Wyoming County); otherwise likely already absorbed by STA.

name: Colonial Bus Svc
recent_news: No public footprint found. Conewago Valley SD (New Oxford, PA) contracts with Lincoln Coach Lines, not 'Colonial Bus Service.' Listed website colonialbus.com belongs to Colonial Equipment Company, a Maryland bus dealership (unrelated). Listed address 359 Brickcrafters Rd, New Oxford appears on Zillow as a residential property. Could be a very small home-based operator, a defunct/renamed contractor, or a mis-scraped record.
website: colonialbus.com (NOT this company; belongs to Colonial Equipment Co., MD bus dealer)
fit_notes: Unverified — cannot confirm this is an active student-transport operator. Before outreach, validate via PA Bus Association directory or PennDOT school-bus carrier list; address geocodes to a residence. Local Adams/York County alternatives in the same footprint (School Express Inc., Krapf/Red Lion Bus) are far better-documented tuck-in candidates.

name: D & K Bus Charter Svc
recent_news: No public footprint found. Listed address 110 SE 6th St, Fort Lauderdale is the 110 Tower, a Class-A downtown office building (mail/registered-agent-style address, not an operating bus yard). Listed website hersheyinsurance.com belongs to an unrelated insurance firm. No D&K Bus Charter shows up in Broward charter or school-bus directories; only an unrelated 'D and K Bus Service LLC' was found in Missouri.
website: hersheyinsurance.com (NOT this company; unrelated insurance firm)
fit_notes: Unverified shell-like record — address is a downtown high-rise, website is misattributed. Likely a registered-agent mailing address, defunct entity, or scraping error. Not actionable for Summit tuck-in pipeline without further validation via FL Sunbiz, USDOT, or Broward Schools approved-carrier list.
